name: Filament Swap
description: One-command filament loading and unloading with automatic nozzle heating and a clean purge.
long_description: Adds `LOAD_FILAMENT` and `UNLOAD_FILAMENT` commands to your printer. Heats the nozzle to your material's temp only if it isn't hot enough already, feeds or retracts at sensible speeds, and purges a short length after loading so your next print starts clean. Override the temp per-swap with `LOAD_FILAMENT TEMP=240`.

variables.name: load_length
variables.description: Fast-feed distance from gears toward the nozzle

safety.notes: Heats the hotend and extrudes. Keep hands clear of the nozzle; run only with filament path accessible.
